attempts.summary: Used sec_analytics health-cicd subcommand to analyze network and DNS logs from OpenSearch for 2026-04-13..2026-04-20; verified weekday CI/CD host 10.0.0.40 contacted app/db ranges and allowed external CIDRs during expected window, with no weekend runs expected.

answer.evidence: Weekdays (Apr 13–17, 2026) showed expected 03:00–04:00 UTC CI/CD activity from 10.0.0.40 to app/db and approved external endpoints; weekends (Apr 18–19) had no runs as expected.
